promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest archived artifact-authority, anti-false-persistence, role-boundary, explicitness, and sealed-handoff packets from the parent batch.
They preserve source lineage while stripping away exact ritual formatting and source-local boot choreography.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items are exact ritual shells, context-bound startup assumptions, or emergency posture claims rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
